name: G-7 per-source granular extends: extends: in a profile is a YAML array of selector strings per §2.5
command: ruby -ryaml -e 'p=YAML.load_file("'$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT'/profiles/financial.yaml"); exit(p["extends"].is_a?(Array) && p["extends"].all?{|x| x.is_a?(String)} ? 0 : 1)' && echo array_of_strings 1>&2
